en: Aha! Jaffa cakes and moon pies.
I don't like moon pies, I'm telling you right now.
ko: 난 문 파이 싫어, 미리 말해둘게.

en: Alright, so Jaffa cake is a spongy...
Are you know what's funny? I don't know that I've ever had a Jaffa cake.
ko: 웃긴 게 뭔지 알아? 자파 케이크 먹어본 적이 없는 것 같아.

en: I don't think I've had a Jaffa cake.
ko: 나도 먹어본 적 없는 것 같아.

en: Moon pie might win for her.
